name: AI Meeting Scheduler — Smart Slot Suggestions to Slack
description: Check calendar availability via Google Drive file listing, have Claude AI suggest optimal meeting slots based on preferences and constraints, and post the formatted suggestions to Slack with Block Kit.

source.originalName: Voice-based appointment booking system with ElevenLabs AI and Cal.com

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post meeting slot suggestions

meetingTitle.description: Title or purpose of the meeting (e.g. 'Q2 Planning Review')

steps.name: List calendar-related files from Google Drive
Build scheduling context from available data
Build AI prompt for slot suggestions
Run Claude AI for slot suggestions
Parse AI response and strip fences
